description: Expected AEGIS findings for the vulnerable benchmark app. Vulnerabilities MUST be found, clean files MUST NOT be flagged by their respective scanners.

VULN-01.description: SQL Injection via taint flow: req.body → trim() → template literal → db.query()

VULN-02.description: SSRF via destructured request body → fetch()

VULN-03.description: XSS via searchParams → new Response() with HTML content-type

VULN-05.description: Command Injection via multi-hop taint: req.body → trim() → exec()

VULN-06.description: SQLi via .rpc() template interpolation in function name

VULN-07.description: Missing authentication guard on API route

VULN-08.description: Missing tenant_id filter — cross-tenant data leak

VULN-10.description: Database query without pagination or row limit

VULN-12.description: Code injection via eval() with tainted input

VULN-13.description: Open redirect via tainted searchParams → redirect()

VULN-15.description: Prototype pollution via Object.assign() with tainted input

VULN-16.description: Cross-file SQL Injection: tainted body → imported wrapper → db.query() template interpolation

VULN-17.description: Cross-file XSS: tainted searchParam → imported renderer → new Response() with HTML body

VULN-18.description: req-alias SQL Injection (v0.7.1 regression pin): req.json() source + template-literal sink — locks req.* / request.* TAINT_SOURCES symmetry

CLEAN-01.description: Properly authenticated route with secureApiRouteWithTenant + requireRole

CLEAN-02.description: Zod .safeParse() sanitizes all taint — no taint findings expected

CLEAN-04.description: Auth route WITH checkIPRateLimit — properly rate-limited

CLEAN-05.description: parseInt blocks SQLi, encodeURIComponent blocks SSRF — per-CWE sanitization

CLEAN-06.description: Locally-shadowed `exec()` function — type-aware resolver identifies LOCAL decl, not child_process

CLEAN-07.description: Cross-file sanitized: imported wrapper parseInt()s raw before db.query() — summary.sanitizesCwes + sink-text mismatch suppress emission

CLEAN-08.description: Cross-file re-exported identity: barrel re-export of no-sink function — module-graph traversal finds empty sinkCwes, no finding emitted
